title: Lakers vs Mavericks Live Score: April 5, 2026 Gametracker Results, Stats, and Updates on CBS Sports
body:
In a thrilling matchup that will be remembered for its intensity and drama, the Dallas Mavericks broke their 14-game home losing streak, the longest in 32 years, by defeating the depleted Los Angeles Lakers 134-128 on Sunday. The victory was made possible by an outstanding performance from Cooper Flagg, who put up an impressive 45 points, leading his team to a much-needed win.

The Mavericks' remarkable turnaround can be attributed to Flagg's exceptional shooting, with the young player sinking 17 out of 25 field goal attempts and 8 out of 12 three-point shots. His efforts were complemented by the supporting cast, who managed to contain the Lakers' offense despite their depleted roster. The Lakers, who were already struggling with injuries, were further weakened by the absence of key players, leaving them vulnerable to the Mavericks' attacking prowess.

The Mavericks' victory marked a significant milestone for the team, which had been struggling to find their footing at home. Their 14-game losing streak had been a cause for concern, with many questioning the team's ability to bounce back from adversity. However, Sunday's win was a testament to the team's resilience and determination, as they proved that they can rise to the challenge when it matters most. The win not only brought an end to the losing streak but also provided a much-needed boost to the team's morale and confidence.

The Lakers, on the other hand, will be looking to regroup and reassess their strategy in the face of adversity. With several key players out injured, they will need to find a way to adapt and compensate for the missing talent. The loss was a harsh reality check for the team, which had been experiencing a resurgence in recent weeks. However, despite the setback, the Lakers remain in contention for a playoff spot and will need to bounce back quickly to maintain their chances.

The implications of the Mavericks' win go beyond the immediate outcome of the game. It sets a positive tone for the team's remaining games and provides a much-needed spark to their season. With several key matchups on the horizon, the Mavericks will be looking to build on this momentum and make a strong push for a playoff spot. The NBA regular season is reaching its climax, and teams will need to dig deep to find the strength and determination to make it to the postseason.

As the NBA regular season hurtles towards its conclusion, Sunday's game between the Mavericks and Lakers was a powerful reminder of the unpredictability and drama that this season has had in store. With several key matchups still to come, teams will need to stay focused and motivated to make it to the postseason. The Mavericks' win was a significant turning point in their season, and they will need to capitalize on this momentum to make a lasting impression on the league.
